g.text: ModelExpress streams model weights GPU-to-GPU over RDMA — bypassing the cold object-store pull.

g.text: Model weights only · DeepSeek-V4-Pro / vLLM on one 8-GPU node — 70 s cold pull vs 11 s RDMA transfer; JIT-cache warmup is a separate cold-start cost.
